## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python build/build.py --base-url ""` if publish output changed
- [ ] `docs/` regenerated and committed if the GitHub Pages site changed
- [ ] public docs updated if shipped behavior changed

## Review Notes

- data/model assumptions touched:
- UI/runtime behavior touched:
- follow-up work or known limitations:
